attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT     
ELRT.ACCRUAL_STATUS_CODE,
ELRT.AMOUNT_BILLED ,
ELRT.CREATED_BY ,
ELRT.CREATION_DATE ,
ELRT.CURRENCY_CODE ,
ELRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,
ELRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE ,
ELRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE ,
ELRT.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID ,
ELRT.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID ,
ELRT.DEPARTMENT_CODE ,
ELRT.EMPLOYEE_ID ,
ELRT.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
ELRT.GLOBAL_NAME ,
ELRT.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
ELRT.ORGANIZATION_ID ,
ELRT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID ,
ELRT.PO_HEADER_ID ,
ELRT.PO_LINE_ID ,
ELRT.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID,
ELRT.PO_RELEASE_ID ,
ELRT.PO_UNIT_PRICE ,
ELRT.QUANTITY ,
ELRT.QUANTITY_BILLED ,
ELRT.REASON_ID ,
ELRT.RECEIPT_EXCEPTION_FLAG ,
ELRT.REQUEST_ID ,
ELRT.REQUISITION_LINE_ID ,
ELRT.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
ELRT.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID ,
ELRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID ,
ELRT.TRANSACTION_DATE ,
ELRT.TRANSACTION_ID ,
ELRT.TRANSACTION_TYPE ,
ELRT.UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,
ELRT.VENDOR_ID ,
ELRT.VENDOR_SITE_ID,
ELRT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
ELRT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,
ELRT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
ELRT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE 
FROM
(
SELECT
SMRT.ACCRUAL_STATUS_CODE,
SMRT.AMOUNT_BILLED ,
SMRT.CREATED_BY ,
SMRT.CREATION_DATE ,
SMRT.CURRENCY_CODE ,
SMRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,
SMRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE ,
SMRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE ,
SMRT.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID ,
SMRT.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID ,
SMRT.DEPARTMENT_CODE ,
SMRT.EMPLOYEE_ID ,
SMRT.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
SMRT.GLOBAL_NAME ,
SMRT.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
SMRT.ORGANIZATION_ID ,
SMRT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID ,
SMRT.PO_HEADER_ID ,
SMRT.PO_LINE_ID ,
SMRT.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID,
SMRT.PO_RELEASE_ID ,
SMRT.PO_UNIT_PRICE ,
SMRT.QUANTITY ,
SMRT.QUANTITY_BILLED ,
SMRT.REASON_ID ,
SMRT.RECEIPT_EXCEPTION_FLAG ,
SMRT.REQUEST_ID ,
SMRT.REQUISITION_LINE_ID ,
SMRT.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
SMRT.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID ,
SMRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID ,
SMRT.TRANSACTION_DATE ,
SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID ,
SMRT.TRANSACTION_TYPE ,
SMRT.UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,
SMRT.VENDOR_ID ,
SMRT.VENDOR_SITE_ID,
SMRT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
SMRT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,
SMRT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
SMRT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_TRANSACTIONS SMRT

UNION ALL

SELECT
SCRT.ACCRUAL_STATUS_CODE,
SCRT.AMOUNT_BILLED ,
SCRT.CREATED_BY ,
SCRT.CREATION_DATE ,
SCRT.CURRENCY_CODE ,
SCRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,
SCRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE ,
SCRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE ,
SCRT.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID ,
SCRT.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID ,
SCRT.DEPARTMENT_CODE ,
SCRT.EMPLOYEE_ID ,
SCRT.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
SCRT.GLOBAL_NAME ,
SCRT.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
SCRT.ORGANIZATION_ID ,
SCRT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID ,
SCRT.PO_HEADER_ID ,
SCRT.PO_LINE_ID ,
SCRT.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID,
SCRT.PO_RELEASE_ID ,
SCRT.PO_UNIT_PRICE ,
SCRT.QUANTITY ,
SCRT.QUANTITY_BILLED ,
SCRT.REASON_ID ,
SCRT.RECEIPT_EXCEPTION_FLAG ,
SCRT.REQUEST_ID ,
SCRT.REQUISITION_LINE_ID ,
SCRT.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
SCRT.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID ,
SCRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID ,
SCRT.TRANSACTION_DATE ,
SCRT.TRANSACTION_ID ,
SCRT.TRANSACTION_TYPE ,
SCRT.UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,
SCRT.VENDOR_ID ,
SCRT.VENDOR_SITE_ID,
SCRT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
SCRT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,
SCRT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
SCRT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS SCRT
) ELRT
WHERE (ELRT.GLOBAL_NAME ,ELRT.TRANSACTION_ID) NOT IN (SELECT ERT.GLOBAL_NAME ,ERT.TRANSACTION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RCV_TRANSACTIONS ERT)
